notableEvents.label: Kyle Farmer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Farmer pops out to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Mike Yastrzemski out at 2nd. Ozzie Albies out at 1st.
